title: Gription
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses}}
'''Gription''', also known as a '''magnatomic grip''', was a friction activated molecular adhesive used to hold two objects together.

Used in [[gription panel]]s, [[gription clip]]s, and [[gription seam]]s, gription was a friction activated molecular adhesive, and was used to hold two objects together through use of an extremely strong molecular bond, capable of holding up to hundreds of kilograms - as demonstrated by gription clips. This molecular bond could be deactivated by depressing certain section of the adhesive layer - a trait used in [[gription panel]]s to great effect. Gription was used in many applications; [[INS-444 window installation droid]]s used [[gription panel]]s in order to transport [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] windows, and the [[DLT-20A blaster rifle/Legends|DLT-20A blaster rifle]] made use of a magnatomic grip to keep the user's hand securely around its grip.

A secondary [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] based type of gription also seemed to exist, used by
[[Unstable Terrain Artillery Transport/Legends|UT-ATs]] by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] [[Galactic Republic/Legends|of the Republic]]. This type of gription worked by reversing the effect of their [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] skids, creating a reverse [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] "gription" field to hold the vehicles in place.

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]''
